name: Chicken Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3/4 tsp Hot pepper sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggs lengthwise in half and remove yolks, placing them in a small bowl.
2. Mash the yolks with a fork. Add chopped chicken, mayonnaise, onion, Dijon mustard, dry mustard, hot sauce, and minced parsley. Blend well.
3. Stuff egg whites with yolk mixture. Sprinkle tops with paprika for garnish. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
